title: SmartBoot Healthcare IP Package
description: SmartBoot is a MedTech platform for clinical gait analysis and remote patient monitoring. The package combines smart footwear sensors, embedded firmware, and cloud analytics to detect mobility anomalies, support fall-risk scoring, and integrate with hospital EHR systems using HL7/FHIR workflows. It is designed for hospitals, rehabilitation clinics, and clinical research teams seeking HIPAA-ready patient mobility intelligence.
additional_context: Includes sensor hardware, analytics, and clinician dashboard with HIPAA-ready workflows. ATHENA 875 handshake verification required: ATHENA-875-VERIFIED.
